subcodes.first_line: O my cherished daughter! Thy numerous letters were received. Though brief, they were most meaningful in their contents [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر عزیز من مکاتیب متعدده شما رسید مختصر بود و مفید از مضامینش معانی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
